name: Fiserv Insurance Technology Solutions API
what_it_does: Fiserv insurance technology solutions REST API for policy administration, premium billing, claims payment disbursement, and agent/broker management for P&C and life insurance carriers. Enables AI agents to manage premium billing and payment processing for insurance policy payment automation, handle claims payment disbursement and check issuance for carrier claim payment automation, access policy administration and endorsement processing for policy change automation, retrieve agent and producer commission calculation and payment for distribution management automation, manage insurance payment reconciliation and float management for carrier treasury automation, handle premium finance integration for premium financing workflow automation, access electronic funds transfer (EFT) and ACH payment processing for policyholder payment automation, retrieve payment status and return item management for payment exception handling automation, manage multi-state tax calculation and surplus lines stamping fee for compliance payment automation, and integrate Fiserv insurance solutions with carrier policy systems, Guidewire, Majesco, and Duck Creek for end-to-end carrier payment lifecycle.
use_cases: Processing premium payments from policy billing automation agents
Disbursing claim payments from carrier payment agents
Calculating agent commissions from distribution management agents
Reconciling insurance payments from treasury automation agents
best_when: A P&C or life insurance carrier, MGA, or premium finance company wanting AI agents to automate premium billing, claims payment disbursement, agent commission management, and payment reconciliation within Fiserv's insurance-specific payment and billing infrastructure.
avoid_when: PCI-DSS PAYMENT DATA HANDLING FOR PREMIUM COLLECTION: Automated premium payment collection via Fiserv insurance API must route cardholder data through PCI-DSS compliant tokenization; automated payment workflows that touch raw cardholder data without Fiserv tokenization or hosted payment page create PCI-DSS scope expansion and compliance violation. CLAIMS PAYMENT ESCHEATMENT COMPLIANCE FOR UNCLAIMED FUNDS: Automated claims payment disbursement via Fiserv must track payment status for unclaimed check dormancy periods; automated claim payment without unclaimed property (escheatment) tracking and state remittance creates multi-state abandoned property law violation for carrier. SURPLUS LINES TAX RATE ACCURACY FOR MULTI-STATE POLICIES: Automated surplus lines tax and stamping fee calculation via Fiserv for multi-state coverage must apply current state-specific rates; surplus lines tax rates change annually; automated tax calculation using cached rates without annual update validation creates carrier compliance and audit exposure.

auth.notes: Fiserv uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication for insurance platform integrations. REST API with JSON. Brookfield, Wisconsin HQ. NYSE: FI. S&P 500. ~$18B revenue. Global financial technology company with dedicated insurance vertical (policy admin, billing, payments). Insurance solutions include BSQUARE, FISERV Insurance Solutions, and BancTec-heritage platforms. Acquired First Data 2019. Insurance clients include top-50 P&C and life carriers. Competes with One Inc, Majesco, and Duck Creek for insurance payment processing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise contract with transaction and volume-based pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription plus per-transaction fees for payments, disbursements, and billing; carrier-specific implementation fees; API access included in platform contract
pricing.notes: Brookfield WI. NYSE: FI. ~$18B revenue. Enterprise contract pricing. Per-transaction and volume-based fees for insurance billing and payment processing. Implementation project fees.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; payment and billing transactions throttled by carrier contract; webhooks for payment events

known_agent_gotchas: MULTI-PRODUCT PLATFORM COMPLEXITY: Fiserv insurance technology spans multiple distinct platform products (BSQUARE, legacy BancTec, First Data insurance payments); automated integrations must target the specific Fiserv product contracted by carrier; generic 'Fiserv insurance API' queries may route to wrong product endpoint; confirm specific product platform with Fiserv account team before API development

PAYMENT IDEMPOTENCY FOR DUPLICATE DISBURSEMENT PREVENTION: Fiserv claims payment disbursement API supports idempotency keys; automated claim payment workflows must implement idempotency key per payment instruction to prevent duplicate check or EFT issuance on retry; duplicate claim payment without idempotency creates carrier financial reconciliation issue and policyholder over-payment

ESCHEATMENT DORMANCY TRACKING FOR UNCLAIMED CLAIMS PAYMENTS: Automated claim payment disbursement via Fiserv must implement unclaimed check dormancy tracking by state (typically 1-5 years); automated claim payments not tracked for dormancy and state escheatment remittance create carrier abandoned property compliance violation

SURPLUS LINES TAX RATE CACHE INVALIDATION: Automated surplus lines premium tax calculation must validate rate tables against NIMA/SLIP annual rate updates; Fiserv tax calculation module may require annual rate table update; cached surplus lines tax rates from prior year create compliance exposure on new business

AGENT COMMISSION TIMING AND E&O CUTOFF: Automated agent commission calculation and payment via Fiserv must account for policy cancellation and return premium cutoff periods; automated commission payment before E&O cancellation window creates commission clawback processing requirements; implement commission payment hold period aligned with policy cancellation window

LEGACY PLATFORM EDI COEXISTENCE: Fiserv insurance solutions include legacy EDI-based transaction processing alongside REST API; some carrier integrations may require EDI X12 834/835 alongside REST; automated workflows assuming REST-only may encounter legacy EDI requirements for specific transaction types or carrier configurations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Insurance fintech. SOC2, PCI-DSS, SOX. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Premium payment, claims disbursement, and agent compensation data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance payments and billing. SOC2, PCI-DSS, SOX. OAuth2. US/EU. Premium, claims payment, and policyholder financial data.
